coverage_goal: 100% public feature-family mapping for requested products, with separate product-ready coverage tracked from implementation evidence.

contract.feature_family_mapping: Tracks whether each requested public feature family is represented by built-in code, external-client adapters, CLI/GUI workflows, platform scripts, or plugin extension points.
contract.product_ready_coverage: Tracks implementation maturity separately so adapter-backed, optional, CLI-only, GUI-only, shell, script, and seam-backed features are not overstated as fully product-ready.

coverage_scoring.feature_family_method: Weighted feature-family mapping. Each feature family counts equally for every product it maps to. Built-in implementations, external adapters, optional implementations, CLI features, GUI features and platform scripts score as mapped; documented seams score partial credit until implemented.
coverage_scoring.product_ready_method: Evidence-weighted product readiness. Each feature family counts equally for every product it maps to, but maturity weights distinguish built-in implementations from adapter-backed, optional, shell, script, documented, or extension-seam features.

network.proxy.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested OpenSSH proxy/jump host argv generation as release-ready adapter coverage.

network.tools.rationale: MobaXterm target treats the built-in network toolbox CLI and TCP checker as release-ready coverage.

network.tunnels.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested local, remote and dynamic SSH tunnel argv generation as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.ftp.rationale: MobaXterm target treats validated external FTP client launch plans as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.mosh.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested Mosh option and SSH handoff builders as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.rdp.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested MSTSC/FreeRDP launch plans as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.rlogin.rationale: MobaXterm target treats validated external rlogin launch plans as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.rsh.rationale: MobaXterm target treats validated external rsh launch plans as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.scp.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested OpenSSH SCP launch plans as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.sftp.evidence: file_transfer queue/previews / row files / gui file browser / tests/test_file_transfer_queue.py
protocol.sftp.rationale: MobaXterm target treats the combined CLI and GUI SFTP workflows as release-ready coverage.

protocol.ssh.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested OpenSSH launch plans and option builders as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.telnet.rationale: MobaXterm target treats validated external telnet launch plans as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.vnc.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested VNC viewer launch plans as release-ready adapter coverage.

protocol.xdmcp.rationale: MobaXterm target treats XDMCP launch plans through local X server clients as release-ready adapter coverage.

security.keys.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested OpenSSH key generation workflows as release-ready adapter coverage.

security.vault.rationale: MobaXterm target treats the optional encrypted local vault as release-ready when the security extra is installed.

session.quick-connect.rationale: MobaXterm target treats combined CLI and GUI quick-connect workflows as release-ready coverage.

terminal.macros.rationale: MobaXterm target treats snippets and macro command execution as release-ready coverage.

terminal.shortcuts.rationale: MobaXterm target treats GUI keyboard shortcuts as release-ready desktop workflow coverage.

terminal.tabs.rationale: MobaXterm target treats the tabbed GUI session shell as release-ready desktop workflow coverage.

x11.forwarding.rationale: MobaXterm target treats tested OpenSSH X11 forwarding flags as release-ready adapter coverage.

x11.server.rationale: MobaXterm target treats local X server helper plans for VcXsrv, XQuartz and Xorg as release-ready adapter coverage.
